markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore a potential SEO partnership between Sanity and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sanity's Need:** Sanity seeks an agency to improve its SEO narrative (countering a "steep learning curve" perception) and build an off-site citation strategy, as on-site content is handled in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Model:** GrowthX uses an AI-powered platform to scale high-quality on-site content creation (editorial and programmatic), with a core offer of 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** GrowthX's programmatic SEO capabilities could optimize Sanity's 10,000+ existing user-generated landing pages, a key opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Pricing & Timeline:** The model is a $40k strategy sprint, followed by a $15k/mo execution retainer. Sanity aims to sign a deal in November.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

## Topics

### Sanity's SEO Challenges & Goals

  - [**Context:** Sanity is a headless CMS with strong PLG and enterprise motions, generating 10k signups/month.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Current Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - **Visibility:** Strong for "headless CMS" (ranks \#3 in some tools).
      - [**Narrative:** Needs improvement; the brand is perceived as having a "steep learning curve."](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [**Primary Need → Off-site SEO:** Build citations and digital PR.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Secondary Need → On-site SEO:** Get tactical ideas and strategy support for the in-house team.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [**Opportunity → User-Generated Content (UGC):** Optimize 10,000+ existing UGC landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered SEO Solution

  - [**Core Offer:** On-site content creation (editorial & programmatic) at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, $40k)**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
          - [Develop audience personas and brand voice artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
          - [Build a "Content OS" (roadmap) and deliver \~10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (12-month retainer, $15k/mo)**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
          - [**Editorial:** 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
          - [**Programmatic:** High-volume content (e.g., 100 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [**Quality Control:**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** An AI workflow validates all claims against a pre-approved knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [**Human Oversight:** Managing editors review and refine all AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [**Add-on Services ($9k–$15k/mo):**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
      - [Microsites & template libraries (e.g., Lovable project).](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [Newsletters.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [Off-site content (e.g., Reddit posts).](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### Strategic Fit & Logistics

  - [**Competitive Overlap:** GrowthX works with Strapi. Tyler confirmed separate, non-overlapping teams are used to prevent knowledge sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [**Timeline & Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
      - [**Kickoff:** Within weeks of contract signing.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
      - [**Results:** Tangible wins expected in 3–4 months, faster for sites with high domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
      - [**Proof Point:** AugmentCode saw 2–3x traffic growth from new guides, driving 300 signups/week.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Follow up with Sanity with a summary and proof points.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [**Pål & Richard:** Discuss internally and schedule a follow-up with the Sanity CMO and GrowthX CEO Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [**Sanity Team:** Aim to finalize a contract in November.](https://fathom.video/share/DbgkLAFtj5BzTHM96uvv8zebr4-nTeZZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
